issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'during this turn', which means the effect applies only while it's your turn, not until end of turn.
Target should filter for {Sky Island} type Characters only. Current target 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' includes Leader and lacks type restriction.
'Up to 1' means optional selection. Target should reflect this optionality if DSL supports it.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your {Sky Island} type Characters gains [Double Attack] during this turn.
